_meta.purpose: A4.3 read-only batch inventory + mechanical risk audit over the full MT-REAL-02 round-summary corpus, via the unmodified A4.2A prototype.
_meta.passes: default(no-rollup) canonical; +rollup pass only to measure sensitivity

risk_audit._observation_id_note: project() tags observation_id provenance DERIVED_DETERMINISTIC but NEVER emits a value; synth_observation_id() is dead code. The two fields below are a HARNESS-side recomputation of what that scheme WOULD yield, NOT the prototype's output — do not read them as proof the prototype produces a unique id.

bimodal_disclosure_audit._note: prototype emits a 'mixed / bi-modal' warning ONLY when run_all_ok>0 coexists with a failing run; it MISSES divergence+same_failure (no all_ok) multi-mode nodes. This under-fires the disclosure; per-node phase booleans on these rounds stay DERIVED_HEURISTIC (never canonical) so no false promotion results.

bhv_52_56_conflation_seed._note: RAW-corpus S4 §E conflation seed. The projection layer strips it (bhv_52_56_* is NOT a canonical external_observation field, so it never enters field_provenance / canonical_candidate). Risk lives in raw data + prose summaries.

temporally_disjoint_scarce_evidence._note: No round carries BOTH the hard-won DIRECT per-node phase axes AND a real integer matrix_status: the phase probe (R80/82/83/84) predates the matured per-run int matrix_status (R85+). This temporal disjointness is a structural ceiling independent of the universal-four floor — it cannot be adapted away.

warnings: synthesized timestamp: source has only a date; T00:00:00Z is fabricated, not a capture instant
config_fingerprint missing: no committed config-content hash and no head_at_gate proxy
missing admission gate: subset-schema gate absent (pre-R82); not reported as a real pass
missing admission gate: pre_gate.intake_counts absent (pre-R77)
lossy phase collapse: no per-run phase-probe; canonical phase booleans are NOT populated from a label->phase heuristic (kept out of canonical_candidate)
tcp_reachable / reality_dest_usable are not separately observed by the probe tooling (only inferable from failure class) -> heuristic, never canonical
missing matrix exit status: no per-run integer matrix_status; an int code is NOT invented from status_counts buckets or the matrix_status object
